_publications._publicationTitle: Microarray analyses reveal regional astrocyte heterogeneity with implications for neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1)-regulated glial proliferation.

_contextSnippet: Similarly, >83% of the cells from these cultures expressed aquaporin-4 (AQP4) and the astroglial glutamate transporter GLAST
details: >83% of cells from cortex, cerebellum, and brainstem cultures expressed GLAST
